prose:
Fukui reactivity indices computed for phenol using DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fitted) in the gas phase at charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied phenol.xyz (single-point, not geometry-optimized at DFT). SCF converged for neutral, cation (+1, doublet), and anion (−1, doublet) states. Mulliken partial charges used. Most electrophilic site: C atom 3 (ortho to OH), f⁺ = 2.103. Most nucleophilic site: O atom 1 (hydroxyl), f⁻ = 0.162. All per-atom Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor values tabulated above. Charge conservation checks passed (sum f⁺ = 1.0, sum f⁻ = 1.0), confirming convergence of N±1 reference states. No warnings reported. Visualization saved to live plot path.</prose>
<parameter name="value">2.103
